ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Lime, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: 45,5% Apfelsaft, 15% Ingwersaft, 10% Acerolapüree, 7% Schwarze-Johannisbeer-Püree, 6% Himbeerpüree, 5% Granatapfelsaft, 5% Agavendicksaft, 3% Limettensaft, 2,5% Rote-Johannisbeer-Püree, 1% schwarzer Karottensaft.
